title: AI-Powered Task Manager

description: A responsive healthcare dashboard built with React that visualizes patient information and healthcare metrics through dynamic REST API integration.

title: Bubble shooter game
description: Developed a interactive web based project using HTML, CSS and JavaScript for functionality, incorporating concepts like Event Handling and Timer Manipulation.

title: Weather Forecast Website
description: A web application that provides real-time weather information for any location, utilizing APIs to fetch data and display it in a user-friendly interface.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and contact information .

title: Product Landing Page
description: A platform for creating and publishing blog posts, with features like rich text editing, commenting, and user profiles.
